title: Operator-System Lorentzian Pre-Length Space (OSLPLS) category definition

phase_2a_5_gate_verdict.headline: OSLPLS category defined cleanly at theorem-grade rigor; commutative MS embeds as faithful sub-category; Krein-side strong-form candidate verifies all OSLPLS axioms and activates Decomposition O Case (iii) substantively; recommend GO to Phase-2.B
phase_2a_5_gate_verdict.recommendation: GO to Phase-2.B (bridge functor extension proving OSLPLS-target Bridge Theorem 6.4'-Q1' with off-orbit super-additivity via Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack)

per_axiom.modification: X -> S(M) state space; pure characters when Abelian

per_axiom.axiom: MS Def 2.3(b) Topology finer than chronological

per_axiom.modification: ell^OS_omega via Tomita-Takesaki modular flow on M with basepoint state omega; modular precedence time tau_mod^omega
statement transports verbatim; proof on Krein-side bridge image deferred to Phase-2.B via Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack
set-theoretic on S(M); cardinality and correspondences inherit cleanly
cover by operator-system sub-cells M_k subseteq M; slab bound beta_k inherits from BW canonical period 2pi
per-cover operator-system LGH at each k
UCP maps with state-pullback basepoint preservation and modular-flow intertwining (automatic from state-pullback via Lemma 4.2-OS)

axiom_transport_analysis.substantive_new_finding: MS reverse triangle 2.3(d) is the *only* MS axiom whose *proof* uses commutativity structurally (via twin-paradox commutative geometric argument). All other axioms transport (i) directly or (ii) with structural / formula-level modification. The OSLPLS reverse triangle proof requires the Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack — Phase-2.B substantive content.

A1_ambient_algebra.load_bearing_dependency: Paper 44 finite-dimensional at finite cutoff; Paper 47 norm-closure in continuum

A2_lipschitz_seminorm.spec: L: dom(L) subseteq A -> [0, infty]; lower semicontinuous; L(a) = 0 iff a in C*1; (B-K) boundedness axiom
A2_lipschitz_seminorm.load_bearing_dependency: Paper 46 Def 5.2 strong-form L^K(a) = ||[D_L, a]||_op; Phase A.2' Lemma krein_sep_qlcms_verification

A3_topography_operator_system.spec: operator system M subseteq A (not necessarily Abelian); contains unit; *-closed; L|_M inheriting Lipschitz structure
A3_topography_operator_system.load_bearing_dependency: Connes-vS arXiv:2004.14115 operator-system framework; Paper 44 propagation number = 2

A4_basepoint_state.spec: faithful (GNS-cyclic) state omega in S(M); Tomita-Takesaki modular flow sigma_t^omega on M well-defined
A4_basepoint_state.load_bearing_dependency: Paper 42 four-witness theorem (BW vacuum modular structure); Tomita-Takesaki standard

A5_operator_system_cover.spec: sequence M_k of operator-sub-systems with: (i) dense union; (ii) nested; (iii) basepoint extends to each sub-cell; (iv) slab bound beta_k < infty
A5_operator_system_cover.load_bearing_dependency: Paper 47 admissible-scaling cutoff; Paper 42 BW canonical period 2pi as slab bound

design_choices_forced_by_axiom_transport: bimodule-sided time-separation form via modular flow (vs symmetric form)
alternative_paths_not_taken: bimodule-extension over a non-commutative base (would give different OSLPLS-like category)
operator-valued time separation (operator system to B(K) instead of state pair to R)
*-homomorphism morphisms (too restrictive; UCP is Connes-vS standard)

oslpls_morphism_definition.morphism_class: UCP maps phi: A_2 -> A_1 (contravariant) with five preservation axioms

M1_topography_preservation.spec: phi(M_2) subseteq M_1; equivalently phi restricts to UCP map M_2 -> M_1

M2_lipschitz_compatibility.spec: L_1(phi(a)) <= L_2(a) for all a in dom(L_2); standard Lipschitz-contractive UCP morphism property

M3_basepoint_state_pullback.spec: phi^*(omega_1) = omega_2; equivalently omega_1 circ phi = omega_2 on A_2

M4_cover_preservation.spec: phi(M_{2,k}) subseteq M_{1,k} for all k

M5_modular_flow_intertwining.spec: phi circ sigma_t^{omega_2} = sigma_t^{omega_1} circ phi on M_2 for all t in R

category_oslpls_cov_verdict.subcategory_OSLPLS_Z2_for_chirality_grad: POSITIVE (refinement of Phase-1 LorPLG_cov^{Z/2} to operator-system level)

construction.object_action: (X, ell, o, U) maps to (C(X), L_ell, M_X = C(X), omega_o = delta_o, U_OS = (C(closure(U_k))))
construction.morphism_action: ell-preserving map f: X_1 -> X_2 maps to pullback UCP map f^*: C(X_2) -> C(X_1), f^*(g) = g circ f

theorem_5_1_OS_parts.a_object_correspondence: POSITIVE (all 5 OSLPLS axioms verify on Abelian C(X))
theorem_5_1_OS_parts.c_faithful: POSITIVE (distinct MS objects map to non-iso OSLPLS objects via Gelfand-Naimark)
theorem_5_1_OS_parts.d_full_on_image: POSITIVE (iso between iota-images comes from MS isometry)

commutative_ms_embedding_iota.structural_reading: Commutative MS is a 'degenerate' sub-case of OSLPLS: topography = full Abelian algebra, modular flow trivial (so ell^OS is degenerate), MS time-separation stored as Lipschitz seminorm L_ell instead. OSLPLS is generative refinement: non-commutative cases derive causal structure from algebraic data, while commutative MS must supply it externally.
commutative_ms_embedding_iota.caveat_on_time_separation_storage: ell^OS_{delta_o} = 0 on commutative C(X) because modular flow trivial; MS time-separation ell stored as L_ell via Connes distance formula. This is the natural storage convention for commutative objects.

krein_side_bridge_candidate.object_action: (A^K, L^K, M^{L, flip}_{full}, omega_W^L) maps to (A^K, L^K, M^{L, flip}_{full}, omega_W^L|_M, U^{L, flip}_{OS})

source_object_specification.ambient: natural Lorentzian operator system A^K on K_{n_max, N_t, T}
source_object_specification.topography: M^{L, flip}_{full} = span_C(O^L union {M^flip_{N, L, M} otimes I_{N_t}: all (N, L, M)}); FULL M != 0 enlargement; non-Abelian per Q1'-Light Case B

theorem_6_1_OS_axiom_verification.A4_basepoint_state: POSITIVE (BW vacuum faithful on enlarged topography; modular flow non-trivial on chirality-flip generators at M != 0)
theorem_6_1_OS_axiom_verification.A5_operator_system_cover: POSITIVE (admissible-scaling truncation; slab bound beta_k = 2pi via BW canonical period)

krein_side_bridge_candidate.substantive_new_content_activated: Decomposition O Case (iii) is structurally NON-EMPTY on the full M != 0 enlargement. Modular flow on chirality-flip generators with M != 0 introduces genuinely different orbit structure beyond (N, L) labels — Phase-1's chirality-grading-preservation argument (Eq. 6.1) FAILS at full M != 0 because [K_alpha^W, M^flip_{N, L, M}] != 0 for M != 0 (BW polar reflection mixes m_j labels).
what_phase_2a_explicitly_does_not_establ: Reverse triangle inequality 2.3(d) at proof level on the Krein-side bridge image (Phase-2.B substantive content)
Functoriality of W^flip on morphisms (mechanical, deferred to Phase-2.B.1)
Convergence transport property B4'-Q1' analog (Phase-2.B.3 + Phase-2.D)
Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack construction (Phase-2.C substantive content)

three_substantive_findings.finding_1_axiom_transport_constrained: MS reverse triangle 2.3(d) is the only MS axiom whose proof uses commutativity structurally (twin-paradox commutative geometric argument). All other axioms transport (i) directly or (ii) with structural / formula-level modification. OSLPLS reverse triangle proof is Phase-2.B substantive content.
three_substantive_findings.finding_2_oslpls_object_structurally_con: OSLPLS object is structurally constrained, not freely chosen. Three design choices (state-space-as-underlying-set, bimodule-sided time separation, UCP morphisms) all FORCED by axiom transport analysis. OSLPLS is the unique operator-system generalization of MS satisfying: (i) contains commutative MS as faithful sub-category, (ii) admits Krein-side bridge image, (iii) is compatible with Connes-vS framework.
three_substantive_findings.finding_3_propagation_number_replaces_ca: Connes-vS propagation number (Paper 44 Prop prop_2 = 2) substitutes for MS Thm 6.2 cardinality bounds: epsilon-net cardinality bounded by prop^2 * dim(M_k) at finite cutoff. Operator-system invariant naturally plays role of MS underlying-set invariant. Convergence theory of MS pre-length spaces (Thm 6.2 pre-compactness, etc.) inherits cleanly via operator-system invariants — encouraging for Phase-2.B / Phase-2.D.

phase_2b_1_morphism_action.scope: Specify W^flip on morphisms (mechanical from Phase-2.A object action + Connes-vS contravariant UCP convention)

phase_2b_2_substantive_bridge_theorem.scope: Prove Bridge Theorem 6.4'-Q1' properties (B1'-Q1'), (B2'-Q1') with substantive off-orbit super-additivity, (B3'-Q1'), (B4'-Q1'). Substantive content is (B2'-Q1') via Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack across distinct KMS states.
phase_2b_2_substantive_bridge_theorem.substantive_content: off-orbit super-additivity (B2'-Q1') — operator-algebraic analog of twin paradox via thermal-time stack

phase_2c_specification.scope: Operator-system Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack across distinct KMS states as standalone structural construction. Genuinely new operator-algebraic content; not in published literature.

phase_2d_specification.scope: Paper 49 drafting (math.OA standalone, 11th in GeoVac series). Title candidate: 'Operator-system Lorentzian pre-length spaces and the strong-form Krein-Mondino-Saemann bridge.'

compression_pattern_assessment.phase_2a_compression: PARTIAL — substrate inheritances (Connes-vS 2021 operator-system, Paper 44 propagation number, Paper 46 enlarged substrate, Paper 42 four-witness, A.3'/Phase-1 bridge template) compressed three structural design choices to forced derivations. Phase-2.A completes in one focused session despite being genuinely new content.
compression_pattern_assessment.phase_2b_compression_uncertainty: Phase-2.B reverse triangle proof requires Connes-Rovelli thermal-time stack — substrate does NOT directly provide this. Connes-Rovelli 1994 is single-KMS-state; stack across distinct KMS states is genuinely new. Phase-2.B may compress to one session if construction admits clean substrate-inherited structure, or extend to multi-week if structural surprises surface.
compression_pattern_assessment.expected_phase_2_total_weeks: 7-12 (consistent with Q1'-Light §5.2 6-10 week estimate for Option γ)

q2_prime_non_commutative_ms_extension.scope: Build non-commutative MS pre-length space concept from scratch (vs OSLPLS which is operator-system replacement). Multi-month NCG-research target; comparable in scope to Latrémolière propinquity development. Not currently in published literature.

named_follow_ons_q2_prime.phase_2a_relationship_to_q2_prime: Phase-2.A delivers Option γ (operator-system replacement), NOT Option δ (genuine non-commutative MS). Q2' is the natural Phase-3 follow-on if Phase-2 closes positively and PI decides to pursue genuine non-commutative MS extension.

concurrent_work_check_pre_phase_2a.from_q1prime_concurrent_work_recheck_mem: No published 'operator-system Lorentzian pre-length space' concept exists as of 2026-05-24. Mondino-Saemann lineage active in 2025-2026 but strictly synthetic/metric. Connes-vS / Latrémolière lineage active but strictly Riemannian. OSLPLS is open territory.
